questions.text: An expression with two terms is called:
questions.explanation: A binomial has two terms (e.g., x + y). Monomial has one term, trinomial has three terms.
This is a standard algebraic identity: (a + b)² = a² + 2ab + b²

questions.correctAnswer: Terms with same variables raised to same powers.
questions.explanation: Like terms have same algebraic factors. Example: 3x and 5x are like terms.

questions.text: The product of monomial and binomial is a ________.
questions.explanation: When a monomial multiplies a binomial, the result is a binomial. Example: 2(x + y) = 2x + 2y
